one_line: Formalized SME override feedback as RLVR advantage-reshaping: assumptions + proposition (SME helps iff c_S(eps)>rho_V, with a trust/override crossover eps* and bang-bang optimal trust) + a runnable numpy simulation that reproduces the helps->hurts sign-change in a lambda x eps sweep; 8/8 tests pass, deterministic, no shared-core edits.
